/usr/bin/c++  -g   CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/tests/test_net_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/Poller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/HeapTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/TcpConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/EventLoopThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/net/EventLoopThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/log/my_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_net_integration.dir/src/log/my_buffer.cpp.o  -o test_net_integration  -lpthread
